notes: Ethique is already available in the US via multiple retailers. Plus many US competitors (Zero Waste MVMT, Unwrapped Life, etc). Market is saturated.
Walgreens has house brand niacinamide serum. Multiple drugstore brands (CeraVe, The Ordinary) already dominate this space at low price points.
Single-dose vitamin C ampoules already crowded: Vichy, Clarins, Sesderma, Pixi, Timeless Skin Care all have this format. Not a gap.
Same as shampoo bars — Ethique already in US, plus multiple competitors. Zero-waste bar market is saturated.
Ethique available in US. Solid face scrubs are niche and haven't proven mass appeal beyond core zero-waste audience.
Ethique in US already. Solid body wash bars compete with cheap bar soap — hard to justify premium pricing at scale.
